message:
test(node): expand trust-card CLI, verify release CLI, and fork detection test coverage

trust_cli_e2e:
- Add parse_json_stdout helper for structured output assertions
- trust-card export: verify --json is required, verify known card JSON
  fields (extension_id, version, publisher, risk_assessment)
- trust-card list: verify publisher filter, column header format, and
  exclusion of non-matching extensions
- trust-card list: verify page=0 is rejected with pagination error
- trust-card compare: verify diff output between two extensions shows
  expected field-level differences (certification, version, quarantine)
- trust-card diff: verify version history changes between snapshots
  (certification_level, reputation_score, revocation_status)

verify_release_cli_e2e:
- verify module: test unsupported compat-version=1 is rejected with
  ERROR verdict and exit code 2
- verify migration: test known "rewrite" lane passes, unknown lane fails
  with "unknown migration target" reason
- verify compatibility: test previous major compat-version=2 is accepted
- verify corpus: test unsupported compat-version=1 is rejected before
  path checks (early validation)

test_rfd_gap (new file):
- Verify RollbackDetector recovers after an epoch gap: after detecting
  RfdGapDetected for epoch 3 (skipping 2), the detector should accept
  epoch 4 without error since last_known was updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
